name: I noticed that Goals are being implemented one-by-one even those the config says

failed_actions.message: execute_claimed_work spawns every previously claimed workflow without reapplying the current global, node, provider, and target-app limits. If an operator lowers a parallel cap after claims are created, the implementation launches more concurrent Goal workflows than the public cap semantics allow, with no compatibility handling or documented transition.
failed_actions.rule: When changing public commands, APIs, durable schemas, or workflow semantics, preserve compatibility where practical; otherwise document the break, migration, and operator impact.

rounds.prompt: I noticed that Goals are being implemented one-by-one even those the config says it should have two working in parallel. There are complex rules for parallel runs so review those (such as Feature ordering and priority). Goals should be implemented in parallel when available.
